serverInfo.name: Walrus Documentation
serverInfo.description: AI-powered Q&A over Walrus decentralized storage documentation. Ask questions about blob storage, erasure coding, storage nodes, CLI usage, HTTP API, and more.

authentication.description: Requires a Kapa API token. The Walrus documentation is indexed under the Sui Kapa project.

tools.description: Search and query Walrus documentation, ask technical questions, and get AI-generated answers grounded in official docs.
